description_long: This is a large, industrial-style blue dumpster with a robust, angular body and a domed lid. The lid features two rectangular slots for depositing waste and is equipped with visible hinges and a locking mechanism on the sides. The dumpster sits on four sturdy caster wheels, allowing for mobility, and has reinforced metal panels for durability. There are prominent handles on the front and sides, designed for easy maneuvering and lid operation. The surface shows signs of wear, including scratches and patches of discoloration, typical of outdoor use. The overall construction suggests it is intended for heavy-duty waste collection in urban environments.
description: A large blue industrial dumpster with a domed, slotted lid, caster wheels, and reinforced metal panels, showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main access handles, a slanted lid with a locking mechanism, and two visible wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the domed lid with two rectangular deposit slots and the full width of the dumpster.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a clear view of the side handle, locking mechanism, and the angular lid design.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back panel, all four wheels, and the rear edge of the domed lid.
attribute_lid_type: domed, hinged lid with two rectangular deposit slots, made of steel or heavy-duty plastic, visible side locking mechanism, single section
attribute_handle_design: Three bar handles: one on the front, one on each side, made of metal, rectangular cross-section, positioned for lifting and maneuvering
attribute_placement_location: outdoor commercial area, residential alley, or industrial site
